properties.description:
At 7:15 PM EDT, a severe thunderstorm capable of producing a tornado was located near Decatur, moving east at 35 mph.

Hazard...Tornado and quarter size hail.
properties.instruction: Take cover now. Move to a basement or an interior room on the lowest floor of a sturdy building. Avoid windows.
properties.headline: Tornado Warning issued April 21 at 7:15PM EDT until April 21 at 7:45PM EDT by NWS Peachtree City GA
